/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/raycater_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/ray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/polygon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raycater.dir/canvas.cpp.o -o raycater  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
